# .github

GitHub configuration files for community standards, issue/PR templates, and CI/CD workflows.

## Files

- **`CODEOWNERS`** - Defines code ownership for automatic PR review assignment.
- **`CODE_OF_CONDUCT.md`** - Community code of conduct for contributors.
- **`CONTRIBUTING.md`** - Development setup, testing guidelines, and contribution instructions.
- **`CONTRIBUTORS.md`** - List of project contributors.
- **`PULL_REQUEST_TEMPLATE.md`** - Template for pull request descriptions.

## Subdirectories

- **`ISSUE_TEMPLATE/`** - GitHub issue templates for bug reports, feature requests, and documentation needs.
- **`workflows/`** - GitHub Actions CI/CD workflow definitions.
